label: homological algebra
evidence: Mathlib/Algebra/Homology (6140 decls) formalizes chain complexes, homology, exact sequences, derived functors — the standard formal home of homological algebra.

label: general topology
evidence: Mathlib/Topology (25904 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for point-set/general topology (open sets, filters, continuity, compactness, metric spaces).

label: extremal graph theory
evidence: Mathlib/Combinatorics/Extremal (18 decls) exists as a dedicated subfolder for extremal combinatorics; thin coverage but the tightest correct path.

label: representation theory
evidence: Mathlib/RepresentationTheory (1951 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for group/algebra representations, characters, FDRep, Maschke's theorem etc.
